_note: Send a file to the user. Only available in 1-on-1 chats — NOT supported in group or multi-person chats. 'originalContentUrl' must be HTTPS and publicly accessible. 'fileName' is displayed in the chat with its extension. 'fileSize' is in bytes and shown in the UI. Max file size: 200 MB. Verify current availability in LINE Developers docs as constraints may change.
